what_was_done: Calm Mode v2 strings + defaults: gated the home-tab banner behind FF_CALM_MODE_DEFAULT, added two new boolean prefs (daily_reminders_enabled, weekly_summary_email; default False) alongside existing show_streaks (also False), wired toggles into the Settings 'מצב שקט' section, and created config/strings_he.json with the exact Hebrew banner copy.

self_check.criterion: user_preferences defaults/schema include three new boolean keys (show_streaks, daily_reminders_enabled, weekly_summary_email) all defaulting to False
self_check.evidence: user_meal_preferences.py lines 117/122/123 declare all three as bool=False; to_dict() and from_dict() serialise/deserialise the new keys; isolated Python import verified default values all False.

self_check.criterion: Exact Hebrew banner string present in strings source used by home tab on first open
self_check.evidence: config/strings_he.json CALM_MODE_HOME_BANNER holds the exact required string 'אצלנו אין סטריקים. אין פרסומות. אין עונשים. אתה בשליטה.'; app_user.py loads it via _load_calm_banner_text() and uses it in st.info(); same string also present as fallback literal in app_user.py.

self_check.criterion: Settings section labeled 'מצב שקט' exposes toggles for the three new preferences
self_check.evidence: pages/14_settings.py line 48 renders the 'מצב שקט' header; toggles wired at lines 55-62 (show_streaks), 86-93 (daily_reminders_enabled), 95-102 (weekly_summary_email).

self_check.criterion: No existing streak or notification logic is removed — diff must show only additions plus default flips True→False
self_check.evidence: Legacy daily_notifications and weekly_summary fields/toggles retained intact in model, repo, and settings page; new daily_reminders_enabled/weekly_summary_email keys are additive. All default values were already False, so no True→False flips were needed in this change set.

self_check.criterion: Banner gated by FF_CALM_MODE_DEFAULT so it does not appear globally without the flag
self_check.evidence: app_user.py line 81 imports FF_CALM_MODE_DEFAULT; line 102 condition: 'if _FF_CALM_MODE_DEFAULT and not st.session_state.get(_calm_banner_shown)'. Flag registered in nutrition_app/feature_flags.py.
